title: SQL: time zone does not have effect on now()
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, name VARCHAR(100), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE events (event_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, event_time TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, user_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id));
SELECT u.name, e.event_time FROM users u JOIN events e ON u.id = e.user_id WHERE e.event_time > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1 day';
key_bug_features: now() function ignores time zone settings
